description: Minimal explicit capability for the main window. Rationale and audit: docs/arch/capabilities.md. core:event:default: listen/unlisten for backend events. core:window:default: isFullscreen() query on mount. core:window:allow-close: onCloseRequested() interception. core:window:allow-destroy: programmatic destroy() on session end. core:window:allow-set-title: setTitle() for OS window title (FS-TAB-010). opener:default: open_url command (http/https/mailto/tel only).
